Package frc.alotobots.reefscape.commands.states.coral

    Description
    StateCoralCoralStation
    Command sequence for intaking from the coral station.
    StateCoralGround
    Command sequence for intaking from the coral station.

    Command sequence for placing game pieces on Level 2.
